## Summary
The function compress_directory() in src/archive_tool.py is vulnerable to command injection attacks due to the use of shell=True with subprocess.run().

## Performance Observations
None found.

## Edge Cases
None found.

## Security & Correctness Issues
In src/archive_tool.py, the function compress_directory() is vulnerable to command injection attacks because it uses the shell=True argument with subprocess.run(), which can execute arbitrary shell commands.

## Architectural Suggestions
None found.

None found.
